tool_metadata.name: create-database-page
tool_metadata.description: Create new database item in specified Notion database

parameters.toolDescription: Create a new item in the specified database with properties and content

values.name: database_id
values.description: The Notion database ID where to create the item

values.name: properties
values.description: JSON object with database properties (Name, Tags, etc.) and optional content

notes.json_format: Properties object should include database-specific fields like Name, Tags, etc.
notes.content_support: Supports both 'content' (markdown string) and 'children' (Notion blocks) properties
